description_long: This restaurant features a rectangular, box-like structure with a dark, weathered wooden exterior and a flat roof. The front facade is adorned with a cream-colored fabric awning, which displays Japanese text and extends outward to provide shade. Below the awning, the entrance is marked by a series of wooden-framed windows and doors, with one section illuminated in a warm orange glow, suggesting interior lighting. The sides and rear of the building are plain, with no visible windows or decorative elements, emphasizing the utilitarian design. The overall appearance is reminiscent of a traditional Japanese eatery, blending rustic wood textures with simple, functional architecture. The building sits solidly on the ground, with no visible foundation or steps.
description: A rectangular restaurant with a dark wooden exterior, cream awning with Japanese text, and a simple, traditional facade featuring wooden windows and doors.
description_view_0: Side view showing the plain, dark wooden wall and the edge of the cream awning extending from the front.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the cream awning with Japanese text, wooden-framed windows and doors, and a section illuminated with warm light.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the plain wooden wall and the awning's edge.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing a featureless, dark wooden wall with no windows or doors.
attribute_signage: Japanese text printed on the cream awning at the front, in a simple black font.
attribute_facade_design: The facade features a dark, weathered wooden exterior with a cream-colored fabric awning that extends outward and displays Japanese text. The front is punctuated by wooden-framed windows and doors, with one section illuminated in orange, adding warmth and inviting ambiance. The design is minimalistic, focusing on natural materials and traditional elements.
